structure.title: INTRODUCTION
structure.summary: The partial document discusses the importance of a robust and reliable power grid, highlighting its vulnerability to various threats like cyberattacks, natural disasters, and physical attacks. It emphasizes the need for advanced technologies and strategies to enhance grid resilience, including smart grid technologies, microgrids, and energy storage solutions. The document also touches upon the regulatory and policy frameworks required to support these advancements and ensure grid security.
